positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring a crescent moon nestled among celestial elements. The main subject is a glowing stylized constellation of geometric shapes and flowing cosmic lines, forming a vibrant, abstract galaxy portrait. The style should be neo-tribal mixed with Art Deco engraving, characterized by clean lines, strong black outlines, and symmetrical negative space. Use a limited but rich palette of deep midnight blue, iridescent teal, gold metallic accents, and cosmic violet. The composition must be suitable for a chest graphic print, centered and easily scalable. The entire image should have a high contrast, illustrative, engraved look, appearing printed on a smooth, dark background.
